reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for deterministic static HTML renderer output; do not treat this as proof of human comprehension or browser visual quality.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is a deterministic renderer contract: the CLI either writes static HTML indexes with decision-first sections over the JSON bundle or it does not.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused CLI and runtime tests: both self-dogfood renderer families write index.html pages, include Decision Summary and navigation structures, and preserve the JSON bundle as source of truth.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when changing self-dogfood static HTML renderer headings, index output paths, source-bundle footer text, or decision-summary section ordering.
